headline: Home Depot unit SRS to acquire HVAC distributor Mingledorff’s
summary: Home Depot Inc (NYSE:HD, XETRA:HDI) said on Tuesday its subsidiary SRS Distribution has agreed to acquire Mingledorff’s, a southeastern US distributor of heating, ventilation and air conditioning (HVAC) equipment, as the retailer expands its push to serve professional...

headline: The Home Depot Subsidiary SRS Distribution Enters into Agreement to Acquire Wholesale HVAC Distributor Mingledorff's
summary: SRS Distribution Inc., a subsidiary of The Home Depot®, has entered into a definitive agreement to acquire Mingledorff's, Inc., a leading wholesale distributor of heating, ventilation and air conditioning (HVAC) equipment, parts and supplies, serving residential and commercial customers through 42 locations in five states across the southeastern U.S.
